raw: $SPX heatmaps, the 6750 node decreased and a king node reshuffle on SPX to 6900, SPY and QQQ near their king node @everyone
$SPX heatmaps, avoid mid ranges and the 6900 king node now could get a reshuffle to lower nodes. No floor on SPY and QQQ. @everyone
The bounce came when SPX reached and reacted off the purple bottom node around 6850\.
$SPX heatmaps, sitting on hands until SPX hits the 6750 purple support node for a possible deflection, if the upper nodes maintain their strength @eve
$SPX downside nodes starting to light up, SPY floor node at 665 @everyone
$SPX heatmaps, lower node starting to gain weight here at 6700, resistance building on SPX @everyone
$SPX heatmaps, king node at 6630 with upper stack and downside protected currently by the gatekeeper cushion under price @everyone
$SPX heatmaps, king node shifted lower to 6560, SPY king node looks good to reshuffle lower @everyone
$SPX heatmaps, upper nodes still lit up that 6650 gate keeper node only resistance on SPX for now @everyone
$SPX is now $45 lower since bobby told you 6600 node is growing and resistance for upside is building, are you learning?
Current king node at 6665 same thesis stands for now
All 3 back above support , 6550 reduced
$SPX heatmaps, lower nodes in SPY and QQQ starting to gain strength and lower king node of SPX at 6370 currently
I'd like to see SPX come down to 6590 for a deflection play of the purple cushion to target the stacked upper nodes @everyone
SPX could see a bounce of this gatekeeper cushion below 6600 to target the upper stacked nodes
$SPX sitting higher since and 680 looking like the next king node  @everyone
